widgets_values: worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted

nodes.title: Model Links - LTX 2.3
widgets_values:
## LTX 2.3 Model Files

**Diffusion Model (UNETLoader)**
- `ltx-video-2b-v0.9.7_distilled_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors`

**Video VAE (VAELoaderKJ)**
- `ltx-video-2b-v0.9.7_vae_bf16.safetensors`

**Audio VAE (VAELoaderKJ)**
- `LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors`

**Text Encoders (DualCLIPLoader)**
- clip_name1: `gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors`
- clip_name2: `ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors`

```
ComfyUI/models/
  diffusion_models/  ltx-video-2b-v0.9.7_distilled_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors
  vae/               ltx-video-2b-v0.9.7_vae_bf16.safetensors
                     LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
  text_encoders/     gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
                     ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Tuning Guide - Prompt Relay AI Verse LTX 2.3
widgets_values:
## Workflow Summary
1. Load LTX 2.3 model + video VAE + audio VAE + dual CLIP
2. LoadImage -> LTXVPreprocess -> LTXVImgToVideoInplace (video latent)
3. LTXVEmptyLatentAudio -> LTXVConcatAVLatent (combined AV latent)
4. 3x PromptRelayEncodeTimeline -> 3x LTXVConditioning -> 3x CFGGuider
5. 3x SamplerCustomAdvanced (chained: S1->S2->S3)
6. LTXVSeparateAVLatent -> VAEDecodeTiled + LTXVAudioVAEDecode -> VHS_VideoCombine

## ManualSigmas per Stage
- Stage 1 (rough): `1.0, 0.9875, 0.975, 0.909, 0.85, 0.0`  CFG=3.5
- Stage 2 (motion): `0.85, 0.725, 0.421, 0.0`  CFG=3.0
- Stage 3 (detail): `0.421, 0.2, 0.0`  CFG=2.5

## Paste scene-to-timeline output into ALL 3 PromptRelayEncodeTimeline nodes (39, 49, 58)
- global_prompt  <- [GLOBAL PROMPT]
- max_frames     <- [MAX FRAMES]
- timeline_data  <- timeline JSON
- local_prompts  <- [LOCAL PROMPTS]
- segment_lengths <- [SEGMENT LENGTHS]
- fps widget     <- match PrimitiveInt fps (node 11)

## Global Controls
- fps (node 11): 25
- width (node 13): 576
- height (node 15): 1024
- frame (node 17): 97  <- must equal max_frames
- seed (node 19): randomize or fixed

## Resolution Presets
- Default: 576x1024, 97 frames, 25fps (~4s)
- Low VRAM: 512x288, 65 frames
- High quality: 1024x576, 97 frames

## Checklist
- Sigma handoff continuous: S1 end = S2 start, S2 end = S3 start
- fps widget in PromptRelay = PrimitiveInt fps value
- frame PrimitiveInt = max_frames in PromptRelay
- segment_lengths sum = max_frames

Over-the-shoulder wide shot of a dark hacker's control room, 4K UHD, HDR lighting, professional cinematic color grading. Wall of multiple glowing monitors displaying stock charts, world maps, and news feeds. Cluttered desk with keyboards and equipment. Only light sources are cold blue and harsh red monitor glows casting shadows on unseen operator's hands and silhouette. Hyper-realistic textures, sharp focus, cyberpunk aesthetic, tense atmosphere.

{"segments":[{"prompt":"Static establishing frame. Hands rest on keyboard in foreground. Central monitor shows politician's deepfaked face beginning to speak, mouth opening. Adjacent screens display stable green stock charts and neutral world map. Red warning light pulses slowly overhead. Camera holds steady, building anticipation. ","length":38,"color":"#4f8edc"},{"prompt":"Aggressive dolly zoom push-in accelerates toward central monitor. Politician's face enlarges rapidly, delivering inflammatory speech with intense expression. Hands begin typing furiously, fingers blur across keys. Camera rush intensifies claustrophobia and panic. ","length":58,"color":"#e07b3a"},{"prompt":"Stock market charts violently plummet from green to deep red, lines cascading downward. World map erupts with spreading red conflict zones, alerts pulsing outward rapidly. Typing hands maintain frantic rhythm. Central politician continues aggressive speech, face now dominating frame. ","length":58,"color":"#5cb85c"},{"prompt":"Final camera push reaches maximum zoom on politician's face, filling center screen. All surrounding monitors fully crimson with crashed markets and global chaos. Red alert light strobes frantically. Hands still typing desperately. Peak visual chaos and alarm achieved.","length":39,"color":"#d9534f"}]}
